name: web
description: Interact with the web: download files from allowlisted hosts or scrape page content from any URL. Use when a task requires fetching remote data or reading web pages.

download.description: Download a file from a URL and save to the session output directory. Supports {{placeholder}} template variables from environment (available: hub_api_key). Returns the saved file path and size. After downloading, inspect content with bash (head, jq) or document_processor for images.

url.description: Full URL to download from. May contain {{placeholder}} variables (e.g. https://hub.ag3nts.org/data/{{hub_api_key}}/file.txt). Host must be on the allowlist.

filename.description: Filename to save as in the session output directory (e.g. 'data.json'). No path separators.

scrape.description: Extract text content from one or more web pages. Accepts an array of URLs, scrapes them in parallel, and returns page content for each. Each URL is independent — one failure won't affect others. Use when you need to read or analyze web page content.

urls.description: URLs of web pages to scrape (1 or more). Each is fetched independently.
